attributes.summary: Build core card schema for dark factory task tracking
attributes.agentNotes:
## Agent Notes

**Status:** COMPLETED

Implemented full schema in `darkfactory.gts`. Key decisions:
- Used `linksToMany` for all cross-card relationships
- Enum fields for status, priority, type
- Tabbed UI pattern for ticket isolation format
- Dashboard with status grid and progress bar on Project isolated view
- `concat` helper used for dynamic inline styles
attributes.description:
## Description

Design and implement the foundational CardDef schema for the Dark Factory platform. This includes:

- `AgentProfile` - Agent identity and capabilities
- `KnowledgeArticle` - Project knowledge base
- `Ticket` - Work item tracking
- `Project` - Top-level project with dashboard
- `DarkFactory` - Workspace index card

## Notes
All cards must support isolated, embedded, and fitted formats for full Boxel compatibility.
attributes.acceptanceCriteria:
- [x] All card definitions compile without errors
- [x] Each card has isolated, embedded, and fitted formats
- [x] Tickets can link to related tickets and knowledge articles
- [x] Project dashboard shows live ticket status counts
- [x] Dark factory theme applied consistently
